findings.title: Advisor brief can mirror code-graph startup producer shape
findings.summary: Use a sibling buildSkillAdvisorBrief(prompt, options) that composes outline, surface, summary, recommendations, freshness state, and shared payload.

findings.title: Advisor freshness authority differs from code graph freshness authority
findings.summary: getAdvisorFreshness should compare SKILL.md discovery signatures, graph-metadata.json mtimes, skill graph artifacts, and advisor script/runtime/compiler mtimes; it should not use git HEAD or code graph tracked-file mtimes as its primary authority.

findings.title: Shared-payload envelope is reusable but vocabulary must grow
findings.summary: createSharedPayloadEnvelope and OpenCode transport coercion are reusable, but first-class advisor envelopes need producer/source enum additions before hooks can emit skill_advisor_brief without failing validation.
